In previous steps we have some acquired facts. But currently we haven't acquired any specific facts besides maybe we have some evidence visible. Probably "evidence_visible" indicates we have some evidence but not all. Since we haven't yet gotten the schema version constants, maybe we are "not_ready". But after expanding file we will get them. But we need to output a tool_call now, so readiness_state likely "not_ready". Let's set readiness_state "not_ready". assistant_message brief status, e.g., "Expanding artifacts.rs to locate schema version constants". Provide tool_call.

We also need to include acquired_fact_ids list; maybe we have none yet, so empty array.

Thus JSON:

{
  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"Expanding artifacts.rs to locate schema version constants",
  "tool_call":{
    "tool_name":"session.expand_file@v1",

      "priority_threshold":0,
      "traversal_budgets":null
    }
  },
  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
  "readiness_state":"not_ready"
}

Make sure no extra fields. Ensure JSON only. Use null or omit tool_call? Must include tool_call if kind is tool_call. So include it.

Make sure payload fields are valid JSON. Provide maybe "target_selector":"path:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Depth optional. Provide depth 2 maybe. Provide relation_filters maybe omitted or null. Let's include depth:2, limit:20.
